[event]
# Treasure Chest
type=event
location=10,11,1,1
activate=on_trigger
hotspot=location
loot=loot/il_chest_common.txt
loot_count=1,2
mapmod=object,10,11,266
repeat=false
soundfx=soundfx/wood_open.ogg
tooltip=Treasure Chest

[event]
# brazier sound effect
type=event
location=9,10,1,1
activate=on_load
soundfx=soundfx/environment/open_fire_loop.ogg

[event]
# Mastite pillar regen
type=event
location=17,7,3,3
activate=on_trigger
cooldown=2s
power=378
power_path=18,8
repeat=true

[event]
# Mastite pillar regen
type=event
location=8,18,3,3
activate=on_trigger
cooldown=2s
power=378
power_path=9,19
repeat=true

[enemy]
type=enemy
location=8,8,12,12
category=il_common
number=7,10
spawn_level=hero_level,1
